text.title: claude-md-creation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for claude-md-creation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CLAUDE.md competes with code tasks for tokens. Long files reduce tokens available for reasoning.

failure-mode.description: Stale content: instructions that don't work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Commands pointing to removed paths or wrong versions silently mislead agents.

failure-mode.description: Duplicate docs: same info in README and CLAUDE.md.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates maintenance burden; when README is updated, CLAUDE.md may drift.

failure-mode.description: Missing commands: not including how to run/test.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents cannot run critical CI steps and produce untested code.

failure-mode.description: No structure: wall of text without sections.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents scan rapidly; unstructured prose is skipped.

failure-mode.description: Wrong audience: written for humans, not AI.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prose like "it's obvious how to set up" or "follow the standard pattern" provides zero machine-readable context.

failure-mode.description: CLAUDE.md contains secrets: API keys accidentally included in example env tables.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every agent session leaks them via context. Never include actual secret values, only variable names.
